scripts.build:app: xcodebuild -project FalconCleaner.xcodeproj -scheme FalconCleaner -configuration Release clean build SYMROOT=$(PWD)/build
scripts.build:dmg: mkdir -p build/dmg_temp && cp -r build/Release/FalconCleaner.app build/dmg_temp/ && ln -s /Applications build/dmg_temp/Applications && hdiutil create -volname "FalconCleaner Installer" -srcfolder build/dmg_temp -ov -format UDZO build/FalconCleaner.dmg && rm -rf build/dmg_temp
scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run build:dmg
